name: core
description: Operating system for building with AI — input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, C3c token-compression bundle (RTK native-tool whitelist + MCP output compression), opt-in local metric telemetry, v1.9 identity stamping, and v1.13 permission-gate (PermissionRequest meta-permission per PERMISSIONS charter — one install consent, zero recurring prompts for Sutra-scope operations).

profile.title: Enforcement profile
profile.description: individual = warn-only, telemetry off. project = warn-only, telemetry on (default). company = HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on.
